task: STRICT FRONTEND FIX — TIMER FOR ALL SECTIONS + FAIRY DUST/MIDNIGHT COLOR SWAP + RUBY GEMSTONE TOP CARD COUNT
scope: frontend only (no Lua, upload pipeline, backend ingest/write, Cloudflare, auth/OAuth/APK, DB schema, PM2/infra changes)

task1_3_timers.behavior: All visible freshness timers now follow the per-section FRONTEND receive/refresh time, not the backend snapshot age.

reset_rules.leaderstats: renderable poll with leaderstats OR account-status row carrying leaderstats (payloadHasLeaderstats)
reset_rules.inventory: renderable poll carrying fish/items/stones/totems rows only; NEVER on status-only account-status poll
reset_rules.failed_poll: no section reset (gated on the raw response before the preserved-inventory merge)

task1_3_timers.in_memory_only: _frontendRefreshAt / _leaderstatsFrontendRefreshAt / _inventoryFrontendRefreshAt are never persisted to or seeded from localStorage.

task4_5_ruby.root_cause: Top card used isRubyGemstoneItem at the card level, but Ruby is a gemstone-family MUTATION carried per-instance (ownedInstances[].mutationName === 'Ruby'); the detail/list view counts at the instance level, so the top card stayed 0.
task4_5_ruby.fix: Added RUBY_GEMSTONE_ALIASES + isRubyGemstoneMutationName + rubyGemstoneCountForItem, which counts Ruby per-instance (same source as the detail view) and falls back to the card-level detector for standalone gemstone items. computeInventoryStats now uses rubyGemstoneCountForItem.
task4_5_ruby.normalization: trim + case-insensitive across cleanName/name/displayName/baseFishName/mutation/mutationTags/bracket and category/type; string amounts coerced via Number.
task4_5_ruby.no_hardcode: Count is derived from data via rubyGemstoneCountForItem; no literal Ruby count.

task6_color_swap.implementation: Key-swap at the top of ftDetailMutationSemanticPalette: key 'fairy dust' -> 'midnight' and 'midnight' -> 'fairy dust'. Both previously fell through to the hash fallback keyed on their own name, so each now adopts the other's resolved theme. No other mutation key is touched; readable-contrast and rarity-distance guards still apply downstream.

updated: site/tests/tracker_fix_2026_06_15.test.js (extracts new ruby helpers; [Ruby] bracket fish now counts, matching detail view)
tests.result: All touched suites green (69/69 across the 4 core suites). Pre-existing, unrelated failures in fishit_blocker10zt6 / fishit_sync_duration_stats_hotfix / tracker_polish_2026_06_15 / fishit_three_separate_indicators (backend grace + stale deploy-marker assertions) confirmed identical with changes stashed (baseline = same 14 failures).

build_deploy.served: GET http://127.0.0.1:8791/public/assets/inventory.53a471bd4d1f.js -> 200, contains formatInventoryRefreshAgeText, rubyGemstoneCountForItem, 'fairy dust' key-swap
